title: astragalus newberryi var. castoreus
intro: Astragalus newberryi var. castoreus, also known as Newberry's milkvetch, is a plant species belonging to the pea family (Fabaceae) and is native to North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its adaptogenic and immunomodulatory effects, which enable it to boost the body's natural defenses and improve overall well-being. The health benefits associated with Astragalus newberryi var. castoreus include reduced inflammation, improved cardiovascular health, and enhanced immune function, making it a popular herb in traditional Chinese medicine. Astragalus newberryi var. castoreus can be prepared in various herbal forms, including teas, tinctures, and capsules, which allow for convenient and targeted supplementation.
